targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'Week ' || to_char(work_date, 'IW') as "Week",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN employee_name END) as "2023",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN employee_name END) as "2024",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN employee_name END) as "2025",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN employee_name END) as "2026"
        FROM work_logs 
        WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
          AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
          AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
          AND employment_type IS NOT NULL 
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) 
          AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
          AND (
              ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
              OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
              OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
          )
        GROUP BY to_char(work_date, 'IW') ORDER BY to_char(work_date, 'IW')

SELECT to_char(work_date, 'Mon') as "Month",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2023",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2024",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2025",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2026"
        FROM work_logs 
        WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
          AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
          AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
          AND employment_type IS NOT NULL 
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) 
          AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
          AND (
              ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
              OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
              OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
          )
        GROUP BY to_char(work_date, 'Mon'), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date) ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date)

SELECT to_char(work_date, 'IW') as "Week",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text as "Year",
               COUNT(DISTINCT employee_name) as "Count"
        FROM work_logs 
        WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
          AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
          AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
          AND employment_type IS NOT NULL 
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) 
          AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
          AND (
              ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
              OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
              OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
          )
        GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT to_char(work_date, 'IW') as "Week",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text as "Year",
               ROUND(SUM(duration)::numeric, 0) as "Hours"
        FROM work_logs 
        WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
          AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
          AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
          AND employment_type IS NOT NULL 
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) 
          AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
          AND (
              ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
              OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
              OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
          )
        GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT to_char(work_date, 'Mon') as "Month",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text as "Year",
               ROUND(SUM(duration)::numeric, 0) as "Hours"
        FROM work_logs 
        WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
          AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
          AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
          AND employment_type IS NOT NULL 
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) 
          AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
          AND (
              ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
              OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
              OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
          )
        GROUP BY 1, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date), 2 ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date), 2

SELECT employee_name as "Employee",
               TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon') as "Month",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text as "Year",
               ROUND(SUM(duration)::numeric, 2) as "Hours"
        FROM work_logs 
        WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
          AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
          AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
          AND employment_type IS NOT NULL 
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) 
          AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
          AND (
              ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
              OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
              OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
          )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date), 3
        ORDER BY 1, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date), 3

list.name: year
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text FROM work_logs ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.name: week
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT to_char(work_date, 'IW') FROM work_logs ORDER BY 1 ASC

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT department FROM work_logs WHERE department IS NOT NULL ORDER BY department

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT activity_type FROM work_logs WHERE activity_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY activity_type

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT employee_name FROM work_logs WHERE employee_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY employee_name
